## Coverage assessment

- **Nexus (priority #1)** — F2-F3 chapter structure; deep on themes (3 theories info / self-correcting / silicon curtain / alien AI); F-G-R per claim acceptable
- **Sapiens** — F3 thesis fully covered (cooperation via fictions); critique surfaced
- **Homo Deus** — F3 dataism + useless class fully verbatim; chapter 9 located
- **21 Lessons** — F3 full TOC 21 chapters across 5 parts; thematic coverage adequate
- **Sapienship** — F2 mission + most recent March 2026 AI agents piece; older corpus thin

**Phase 1 acceptance:** PASS. Sufficient evidence для Phase 2 lens docs. R6 provenance per source maintained. EP-5 disclosed (Wikipedia + secondary reviews; NOT primary book reading — F2-F3 grade, not F5+).
